note: Provenance for the vendored prebuilt dav1d AV1-DECODE WASM core (ADR-085/093). Self-hosted (committed + served same-origin, NOT a runtime CDN dependency). dav1d itself is BSD-3 (VideoLAN); the dav1d.js wrapper is CC0 (public domain). 8-bit 4:2:0 only (10-bit honestly declined by supports()). Re-vendor + sha256-refresh steps are in BUILD.md.
